name: Valledi
short_description: Dive into a journey of grief and overcoming with Diana and her drone, in search of an ancient legend, passing through mountains, caves, mines, and a lot more in a great adventure filled with challenges.
detailed_description:
After years stuck in grief, Diana depart on a journey in search of an ancient myth - A mystical place where legend says to realize the deepest wish of the person who find it. But Diana is about to find out that reaching there will be much harder than she thought, and now with her drone companion, she will face a hard journey of challenge and overcoming.

About the game

Valledi brings a different take on the platforming genre: instead of jumping, the player shoots the drone and teleport to wherever the drone is. With this mechanic, the player can pass through cliffs and hazardous terrains, while other interactions with the drone allow to take on enemys and puzzles along the way.

Contents

  • Over 250 stage screens

  • Constant new game mechanics every new level

  • A careful crafted pixel art world

  • Acessibility options to reduce struggle.

_________________________________________________________________________________________________________

"When I first learned about my eyes, I thought science would be the best thing in my life. But now, all I can do is search in the mystic the solution that the science could not help me"
